review_title: Everything I could want in an IP data provider!
description: The support have been super responsive to all our needs.
author: Jesse H.
pros: I love the company data endpoints. So powerful and data rich.
cons: I don't really have anything negative. The API is simple and easy to understand.

description: I like the way I can use IpInfo, It is extremely easy to use, jus ttype the IP in the box and all information is there. Even if the IP is behind a VPN, IpInfo can detect VPN IPs
author: Guilherme N.
pros: It always has the database up to date, it has never failed on me.
cons: It does not have abuse report system. It would be nice to know about previous searches and community rating.

review_title: It reverse an ip to a domain
author: George G.
pros: I like that it helps reverse an IP to a domain. What I'm looking is mostly businesses.
cons: I get to pay for a lot of ISP and bot traffic which is not ideal. I only get 20% of real businesses the rest is ISP but is ok for now.

author: Steve K.
pros: We use this mainly for security purposes, to look-up unknown IPs to us to determine whether or not to allow them to continue into out site. A simple cURL script with json response provides all that we need per hit.
cons: The recent change in the dashboard has made a visit to IPinfo.io itself more confusion that it had been before. Sometimes we find that the mapping of IPs are slightly inaccurate-- ex. my own IP which is in Levittown, PA often shows up in Trenton NJ.. a mile away but in the incorrect State and Zipcode.

description: We were in a pinch to identify and score traffic for security, mostly spammers from overseas. I reached out to ipinfo and we were running in less than a day. We have never had to change anything about our implementation, only take advantage of new features if we want to. That is the essense of the best infrastructure software - easy, well documented, great support if we need it, stable APIs.
author: Patrick D.
pros: Super easy to implement, dial-tone reliable, and they keep adding new features but honoring our original agreement
cons: Really nothing to improve, it feels like a shill review but I work with a lot of vendors and IPinfo is top tier

review_title: IPinfo - the best IP data service
description: My experience has been nothing but positive.
author: Scott S.
pros: My favorite feature is how I can pull the data I need in real-time instead of downloading a file that is out-of-date as soon as it is fetched. I also like the way it identifies ISPs and organizations which makes it easy for me to create filters to see the data I want.
cons: I really don’t have any negative feedback.

description: Once we got on a paid plan, IPinfo has worked seamlessly. Been trying to think of other ways to use the features.
author: Chriztina M.
pros: I have a "countdown to free shipping" message on the cart pages of my website. I use IPinfo to make sure the correct message is displayed based on the visitors location.
cons: When I was on the "free" option, the "countdown to free shipping" message was intermittent. Sometimes it would work, sometimes it didn't. It was most likely because we exceeded the amount of daily requests but I didn't have access to the admin at the time.

description: They have been great and very easy to deal with. Upfront pricing model and high availability.
author: Craig K.
pros: IP location data changes all the time and IPinfo has the best data of all the sources we have tested by a fair margin. We depend on this service and it has not had an outage since we started using it over 2 years ago.
cons: It meets our needs so I don't see any cons

review_title: Very useful service and amazing customer support - stability could be a little better
description: Amazing support that is always willing to help you out, top-notch quality, stability is good enough for my use. Overall, probably, the best choice, but you might need some fallback.
author: Aivar K.
pros: Easy to deploy and robust API Almost always latest, up to date data Low mistake/"dirty data" rate Ability to test it out thoroughly before paying anything
cons: Service is unavailable a bit too often (up to 30-60 minutes each month) Could be a deal-breaker for live use where it is mission-critical

author: Johanna R.
pros: The biggest thing for me and my team, was ease of use. The API was super simple to integrate into the application we were creating and had no trouble at all.
cons: I don't like that I can't think of anything bad about this product/service.

description: The ease of use saves us a lot of time building out our own solution. It is used every day to power experiences for thousands of our users and is very reliable.
author: Dylan B.
pros: Very easy to setup, reliable API, been using for years without issue.
cons: More backend reporting could be helpful.

description: We use IPInfo to monitor visits to client websites and to identify who is visiting the site. The IPInfo API enables us to achieve this goal relatively easily and to integrate the visitor information with other visit intelligence to produce a very useful package.
author: Clinton D.
pros: Easy to implement and the speed is very good. The customer service is excellent and the team helped us to get started.
cons: I am not sure that the accuracy of the data can’t be improved.

description: Awesome product! Easy to use, install and manage. Great reporting features included.
author: Sara C.
pros: Easy to use, install, manage. It exceeded the needs we had and it works perfectly!
cons: We have not yet encountered any issues or reasons to add to the con list. We have been using IPinfo for almost 12 full months at the time of this review.

author: Chaithanya P.
pros: Easy to Integrate. Very good documentation for all languages.
cons: Response times can be much faster and analytics forecasts will be helpful.

review_title: Pretty good service but privacy concerns
author: Andreas W.
pros: It does exactly what is expected. The service just works without any problems.
cons: Here in europe it is very hard to argu that I am allowed to use this service with respect to GDPR laws.

author: Marko M.
pros: The quality products/services they offer. The ease. The support.
cons: There is absolute nothing to dislike, everything is perfectly made.

author: Afsaneh H.
pros: Experience and tell us if you like this We are waiting for your response
cons: Wait for this to be asked of yoU give us the experience of using this software
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It was very easy to integrate into our sites and the results were exactly what we were looking for.
author: Jake O.
pros: There are two things that stand out about IPinfo, its cost and its ease of integration into our sites.
cons: I have found no cons with this product, it does exactly what it is supposed to do.

author: Vikram S.
pros: Good to trace the IP location while syncing with Google.
cons: Still need user friendly which is not happening

review_title: High quality dataset and easy to use
author: mengjie X.
pros: Complete - the dataset covers company IP address outside the US
cons: If I can search the ASN/IP range by the company name, that would be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Geo IP for country code selection
author: Xander B.
pros: the service was easy to inplement as the country code select component supported ipinfo services.
cons: at this stage it does the job as expected so no cons so far

author: Mike L.
pros: Simple API and good data, dashboard provides useful info
cons: I can't think of much, other than perhaps price reductions for searching the same address multiple times in a window of time

author: Roland P.
pros: The IP to Geolocation functionality is satisfying our needs!
cons: Nothing. My Needs are fulfilled! Everything is ok!

description: We use it for security purposes
author: Darcy P.
pros: It is accurate. We get the results we require to solve our problems
cons: No cons at this moment. It does what we expected

review_title: Great experience for our use case
description: When a friend and I needed to scale our project, one of our first concerns was with acquiring high-quality IP data. We run a Discord-powered game needed a way to validate the IP geolocation and privacy data (if using a VPN or not) for hundreds of thousands of users, for the purpose of improving our cheat-detection methods. As full disclosure, I'm formerly part of the IPinfo team but have been completely uninvolved for over a year now. My experiences with my colleagues and the product are what led me to return as a customer.
author: Craig S.
pros: IPinfo was everything we expected it to be: easy to implement, accurate, and thorough. We have all the IP address data we'll ever need, and the uptime is fantastic.
cons: We've yet to have any issues with the API.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
